Part of the Digital Americas organization. Responsibilities:

- Develop and lead high impact strategic programs for Linde Americas
- Serve as a subject matter expert (SME) in the application of Analytics (using OR and ML methods) to supply chain and operations.

- Develop new projects for the team through discussions with regions SME Initiatives:

#### Lead Data Scientist
...
Oct 2016 - Aug 2022 (5 years and 10 months) in Danbury, CT
...
Working in Business and Supply Chain Optimization group within the Digital organization. Role involves application of OR, data science and other analytics techniques to solve business problems that impact the operating profit of Linde business units. Responsibilities:
...
- Manage end to end development of technology programs from business case generation to commercialization
- Lead multi-disciplinary project execution teams spanning IT, business, and corporate
...
- Stay abreast of new technology developments as well as collaborating with universities to research longer term problems Initiatives:
...
- Evaluation and deployment of scheduling optimization solution for the US liquid distribution business (Lead)
- Development of a system to determine optimal customer tank sizes in the US (Lead)
- Development of a discrete event simulation system for training planners and aiding decision support type analysis for the US logistics organization (Lead)

...
• new technology
...
• cross-functional teams
...
We are delighted to welcome Dr. Sriraam Natarajan to the CARE Advisory team at the Mehta Family Foundation.
...
Dr. Natarajan brings deep expertise in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and their applications in healthcare and biomedicine - areas that sit at the heart of our mission to advance research, collaboration, and innovation across India's academic institutions.
...
Dr. Natarajan is a Professor and Director of the Center for Machine Learning in the Department of Computer Science at The University of Texas at Dallas . He is a Fellow of Association for the Advancement of Artificial Intelligence (AAAI) , hessian.AI , and the Asia-Pacific Artificial Intelligence Association (AAIA), and holds a WSAI Distinguished Visiting Chair at Indian Institute of Technology, Madras .
...
He has received numerous honors, including the President's Teaching Award for Excellence in Graduate Teaching, the Young Investigator Award from the U.S. Army Research Office, and multiple industry and best paper awards. He served as Program Co-Chair of AAAI 2024, SDM 2020, and ACM CoDS-COMAD 2020. He is an Associate Editor of the Machine Learning Journal (MLJ), Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR), and Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery (DAMI), an elected member of the AAAI Executive Council, and Secretary-Treasurer Elect of IJCAI.
...
His research spans Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with particular focus on Statistical Relational Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Graphical Models, and Biomedical Applications. He has authored over 150 peer-reviewed publications and co-authored three books in the field.

results.title: Chemical Engineering Jobs at Linde | Trainee Engineer Role
highlights:
## Chemical Engineering Jobs at Linde | Trainee Engineer Role
...
Looking for exciting Chemical Engineering Jobs in a leading global company? Linde Careers has announced a Trainee Engineer Job for fresh engineering graduates in Bengaluru. This opportunity is ideal for candidates seeking hands-on experience in plant operations, maintenance, process optimization, and industrial gas production. If you are searching for a Graduate Trainee Engineer role with excellent career growth, this Linde Recruitment 2026 notification is worth exploring.
...
- Position: Trainee Engineer – Operations
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka
- Reference Code: req31118
...
Linde South Asia Services Pvt. Ltd. is part of Linde, one of the world’s leading industrial gases and engineering companies operating across more than 100 countries. Through innovative technologies and sustainable solutions, the company serves industries including healthcare, chemicals, manufacturing, electronics, food and beverage, and refining. Linde Careers offers employees exceptional opportunities to learn, grow, and contribute to impactful projects while supporting a productive and sustainable future.
...
Linde South Asia Services Pvt. Ltd. has invited applications for the position of Trainee Engineer – Operations in Bengaluru, Karnataka. The selected candidates will be groomed for Engineer Operations and Maintenance (O&M) and Customer & Medical Engineering Services (C&MES) roles. The position
...
involves operating plants safely, optimizing plant parameters, improving efficiency, ensuring compliance with industry standards, and supporting maintenance activities. This Trainee Engineer Job provides valuable exposure to industrial operations, project coordination, and process management in a global engineering environment.
...
Key Responsibilities
...
- Coordinate with maintenance teams to prevent unscheduled breakdowns through condition monitoring.
- Monitor machine efficiency and plant performance for optimal output.
...
- Troubleshoot process-related issues and implement corrective actions.
...
- Ensure effective water treatment programs and maintain required water quality standards.
...
- Coordinate projects, raise CAPEX requirements, and manage vendor interactions.
...
- Serve as the site in charge and plant emergency coordinator when required.
...
- Maintain plant logs and operational records.
...
- Support shift management and medical gas production according to FDA standards.
...
- Ensure compliance with Pollution Control Board norms and quality management systems.
...
- Prepare monthly MIS reports and production performance reports.
- Maintain statutory compliance related to licenses and regulatory requirements.
...
Qualification: B.Tech / B.E. in Chemical Engineering
...
- Plant Operations Knowledge
- Process Monitoring and Optimization
- Maintenance Coordination
- Troubleshooting Skills
- Project Management
- Safety Compliance Awareness
- Technical Reporting
- Communication Skills
- Teamwork and Collaboration
- Problem-Solving Ability
- Industrial Process Understanding
- Quality Management System Awareness
...
Application Deadline: 26 June 2026
...
If you are searching for Chemical Engineering Jobs and looking to begin your career with a globally recognized organization, this Trainee Engineer Job at Linde offers an excellent opportunity. With exposure to plant operations, maintenance, project execution, and industrial gas technologies, candidates can build a strong professional foundation. Explore Linde Careers today and take the next step toward a rewarding engineering career with one of the industry’s leading companies.

results.title: Data Scientist (100%) - MDPI Switzerland
highlights:
Data Scientist (100%) - MDPI Switzerland
...
Product & Technology · Basel Office - MDPI Headquarters
...
# Data Scientist (100%)
...
## Drive innovation in machine learning and AI, from research to deployment, creating scalable intelligent systems that power the next generation of scientific discovery.
...
Are you passionate about turning complex data into intelligent, production-ready solutions while supporting the future of open-access science? We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team and help design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning solutions that power intelligent, data-driven products. This role focuses on NLP, recommender systems, and agentic LLM workflows, turning complex business challenges into scalable and impactful analytical solutions.
...
This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of machine learning and AI, contributing to innovative systems that leverage state-of-the-art research in practical applications.
...
Core Responsibilities
...
Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning and statistical models, with a focus on NLP, recommender systems, and LLM-based solutions.
...
Translate business problems into data-driven approaches and scalable analytical solutions.
...
Perform data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for modeling.
...
Develop, optimize, and benchmark models using appropriate metrics and validation strategies.
...
Build and experiment with LLM-powered systems, including agentic workflows and RAG.
...
Investigate, reproduce, and compare research prototypes and state-of-the-art methods.
...
Collaborate with engineering teams to support the integration of models into production.
...
Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.
...
Bachelor’s degree/ Master's degree in Computer Science or related.
...
2-5 years of experience as a Data Scientist.
...
2–5 years of experience in Python (including complex applications), Machine Learning, and LLMs.
...
Strong background in data science, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.
...
Intermediate proficiency in FastAPI, Celery, and Keycloak.
...
Intermediate proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face.
...
Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP), including tokenization and named entity recognition (NER).
...
In-depth understanding of Artificial Intelligence principles.
...
Strong working knowledge of Microsoft O365 tools.
...

results.title: LLM Engineer job with VIB | 12860950
highlights:
LLM Engineer job with VIB | 12860950
...
# LLM Engineer
...
Employer VIB Location Leuven Closing date 19 Aug 2026
...
## Job Details
...
VIB is a leading life sciences research institute in Flanders, Belgium, with a strong focus on translating basic scientific discoveries into benefits for society. With the launch of VIB.AI, we are expanding our mission to harness the power of artificial intelligence for life sciences research, innovation, and impact.
...
The VIB Center for Neuroscience Leuven (CNL) investigates the mechanisms of brain function and neurological disease across the scales of biology, spanning neurodegeneration, neurodevelopment, synaptic biology, and computational neuroscience. AI and large language models have transformative potential across these research areas.
...
We are now looking for an LLM Engineer in a shared position between VIB.AI's Machine Learning Expertise Unit and the Center for Neuroscience. You will split your time between building institute-wide AI tools and applying them directly to neuroscience research challenges.
...
As an LLM Engineer in this shared position, you will:
...
- Develop and deploy LLM-based pilot projects tailored to neuroscience research at the CNL, applying AI to questions in molecular, cellular and circuit neuroscience, neurodegeneration, neurodevelopment and disease mechanisms.
...
- Build and maintain components of VIB's institutional intelligence layer, including agentic bioinformatics workflows, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, and AI-assisted experimental design tools.
...
- Design, implement, and evaluate LLM-based solutions for scientific text mining, multimodal integration of literature and biological data, and knowledge extraction to support discovery.
...
- Collaborate with wet-lab and computational neuroscience researchers to identify opportunities where generative AI and LLMs can accelerate scientific progress.
...
- Work with the Machine Learning Expertise Unit and VIB's AI Studio to translate pilot projects into practical tools that serve the broader VIB community.
...
- Promote ethical, transparent, and responsible use of LLMs in line with best practices and international standards.
...
- Mine opportunities and data at the center’s advanced technology expertise centers and affiliated central core facilities.
...
- Leverage VIB's Data Core services, including high-performance computing pipelines and large-scale GPU resources, to scale LLM development and deployment.
...
- PhD in machine learning, computer science, computational biology, computational neuroscience, statistics, or a related field.
- Strong experience with large language models, including pretraining, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and evaluation.
- Knowledge of modern deep learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow).
- Experience with real-world applications of LLMs in scientific or biomedical contexts is a plus.
...
- Familiarity with neuroscience data types (imaging, electrophysiology, genomics, proteomics, or clinical data) is a plus but not required.
...
- Ability to work collaboratively across disciplines and communicate effectively with researchers from different backgrounds.
- A strong interest in applying LLMs to impactful life science and neuroscience problems.
...
- The opportunity to pioneer applications of LLMs in neuroscience and the broader life sciences.
...
- Direct access to VIB's Data Core services, which provide expert support in data management and high-performance computing, including optimized pipelines and large-scale GPU resources.
...
Please complete the application through the VIB online application tool. A complete application file should contain the following documents:
...
For further information, please send an email to stein.aerts@kuleuven.be or joost.schymkowitz@kuleuven.be with subject title Inquiry: LLM Engineer CNL/VIB.AI.

results.title: Machine Learning (ML) Engineer at VIB.AI job with VIB | 12860981
highlights:
Machine Learning (ML) Engineer at VIB.AI job with VIB | 12860981
...
# Machine Learning (ML) Engineer at VIB.AI
...
Employer VIB Location Leuven Closing date 21 Aug 2026
...
## Job Details
...
Application deadline: August 31, 2026 About us VIB is a leading life sciences research institute in Flanders, Belgium, with a strong focus on translating basic scientific discoveries into benefits for society. With the launch of VIB.AI, we are expanding our mission to harness the power of artificial intelligence for life sciences research, innovation, and impact. We are now looking for a Machine Learning (ML) Engineer to join the Machine Learning Expertise Unit at VIB.AI. Your role As an ML Engineer, you will: Develop and deploy ML solutions in close collaboration with researchers across VIB centers, applying state-of-the-art methods to cutting-edge biomedical questions.Design, implement, and evaluate ML and foundation-model approaches, including LLM-based solutions, for scientific text mining, multimodal integration of literature and biological data, and knowledge extraction to support discovery.Collaborate with researchers to identify opportunities where generative AI can accelerate scientific progress.Work within the Machine Learning Expertise Unit and with VIB AI Studio to translate pilot projects into practical tools.Promote ethical, transparent, and responsible use of AI in line with best practices and international standards.Leverage VIB Data Core services, including high-performance computing pipelines and large-scale GPU resources, to scale ML development and deployment. Your profile PhD in machine learning, computer science, computational biology, statistics, or a related field.Knowledge of modern deep learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow).Experience developing AI applications for scientific or biomedical research, including LLM-based and agentic AI systems, is a plus.Ability to work collaboratively across disciplines and communicate effectively with researchers from different backgrounds.A strong interest in applying ML to impactful life science problems.We welcome applications from both early-career and experienced ML engineers. Our offer A stimulating, international, interdisciplinary, collaborative, and supportive work environment, which emphasizes diversity and inclusion.An environment that promotes personal development.The opportunity to pioneer applications of ML in biomedical sciences.Direct access to VIB’s Data Core services, which provide expert support in data management and high-performance computing, including optimized pipelines and large-scale GPU resources.A competitive salary and benefits package, with relocation support if needed.The chance to make a lasting impact on science, health, and society. About VIB.AI VIB.AI is the artificial intelligence initiative of VIB, designed to accelerate breakthroughs in life sciences by integrating advanced AI methods into research, discovery, and innovation. For more information, visit vib.ai/en. How to apply Please complete the application through the VIB online application tool (https://jobs.vib.be/apply/135914). A complete application file should contain the following documents: Your motivation letter stating career goals, past experience, and how these relate to the current position.Your CV.Contact information of three references. Application deadline: August 31st 2026. For further information, please send an email to pedro.goncalves@kuleuven.be, dmitry.kobak@ugent.be or stein.aerts@kuleuven.be with subject title Inquiry: ML Engineer.

highlights:
Johnson Controls is seeking a talented and passionate Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist to join its Data Science & AI team in Pune. This role is an excellent opportunity for aspiring data science professionals who want to work on advanced machine learning, artificial intelligence, and cloud-based analytics solutions. As part of a global technology-driven organization, you will contribute to building intelligent systems that transform complex business challenges into data-driven solutions. The position offers exposure to cutting-edge technologies including machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, cloud computing, and MLOps, making it an ideal opportunity for professionals looking to accelerate their careers in the rapidly evolving field of data science.
...
In this role, you will collaborate with data engineers, AI specialists, cloud architects, and business stakeholders to develop scalable machine learning models and AI-powered applications. You will work extensively with Python, SQL, Microsoft Azure, Azure Machine Learning, Azure Databricks, and Azure OpenAI services to create intelligent solutions that generate measurable business value. The position involves the complete machine learning lifecycle, including data preparation, feature engineering, model development, deployment, monitoring, and optimization. By leveraging advanced analytics and cloud-native technologies, you will help build predictive and automated systems that improve operational efficiency and business decision-making.
...
The Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist role provides an exceptional platform for learning and innovation. Johnson Controls encourages continuous skill development through mentorship programs, certification sponsorships, and hands-on exposure to enterprise-scale AI and machine learning projects. You will gain experience working with modern technologies such as Generative AI, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), deep learning frameworks, and cloud-based MLOps solutions. This position is ideal for candidates who are eager to solve real-world business problems using data, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics while contributing to transformative technology initiatives within a globally recognized organization.
...
• Design, develop
...
• Utilize Azure OpenAI and other AI services to develop intelligent applications, automation solutions, and generative AI-powered business capabilities.

• Knowledge of Generative AI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and prompt engineering concepts will be highly beneficial.
...
The expected salary for an Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist at Johnson Controls in Pune typically ranges between ₹8 LPA and ₹16 LPA, depending on educational background, technical expertise, project experience, cloud certifications, and machine learning proficiency. Candidates with strong Azure cloud knowledge, hands-on AI and machine learning experience, deep learning expertise, and exposure to Generative AI technologies may receive compensation toward the higher end of the range, along with performance incentives, certification sponsorships, learning benefits, and long-term career growth opportunities.

The Applied Intelligence for Discovery (AI4D) team is a newly formed group within Lilly Research Laboratories that operates at the intersection of scientific delivery and core platform development. AI4D’s mission is to connecting scientists to petabyte-scale data through natural language interfaces, automated analysis workflows, and intelligent search — and to convert early deployments into repeatable system standards and evaluation practices that scale across therapeutic areas.
...
As a Generative AI Engineer, you will design, build, and operate the core AI systems that power this transformation: retrieval-augmented generation over internal scientific documents, text-to-SQL over complex omics databases, agentic workflows that automate multi-step analyses, and the evaluation infrastructure that able the next-generation of medicines for patients.

...
Implement multi-step reasoning approaches (chain-of-thought, self-correction, Reflexion loops) to improve accuracy on complex scientific queries

Design agentic AI workflows that chain database queries, bioinformatics tools, literature search, and visualization into automated multi-step scientific analyses
...
Evaluate and integrate emerging orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, custom architectures) for scientific use cases

Experience building LLM-powered applications, including at least two of: RAG systems, text-to-SQL, agentic workflows, or fine-tuning pipelines
...
Strong software engineering skills in Python with experience building production-grade systems
...
Deep familiarity with the modern LLM ecosystem: embedding models, vector databases, and orchestration frameworks
...
Experience designing evaluation frameworks for LLM systems — systematic approaches to measuring accuracy, detecting hallucinations, and tracking regressions
...
Experience with MLOps/LLMOps tooling: experiment tracking, model registries, prompt versioning, A/B testing for AI systems
...
Knowledge of biomedical ontologies (Gene Ontology, MeSH, ChEBI) or experience integrating domain-specific knowledge into LLM systems

Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
values, identifying outliers
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
is strongly preferred and will
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
